message:
feat(tui,bench): add Search Cockpit screen and global search benchmark harness (br-3vwi.2.3, br-3vwi.4.1)

TUI Search Cockpit (br-3vwi.4.1):
- Add SearchCockpitScreen (crates/mcp-agent-mail-server/src/tui_screens/search.rs)
  implementing the keyboard-first query bar, facet rail, and result
  preview pane for the unified global search surface
- Wire SearchCockpitScreen into MailAppModel's screen registry and
  add MailScreenId::Search variant to the screen ID enum
- Register screen metadata (title, description, keybinding) in the
  MAIL_SCREEN_REGISTRY for navigation and help display

Global Search Benchmark Harness (br-3vwi.2.3):
- Extend crates/mcp-agent-mail/benches/benchmarks.rs with a deterministic
  global_search bench group that seeds synthetic mailboxes at three scales
  (small=1K, medium=5K, large=15K messages) and measures DB-level search
  pipeline latency (planner → SQL → row mapping) via execute_search_simple()
- Write per-run artifacts to tests/artifacts/bench/search/<run_id>/summary.json
  with p50/p95/p99 latencies for regression tracking
- Add budget enforcement gated by MCP_AGENT_MAIL_BENCH_ENFORCE_BUDGETS=1
  environment variable for CI integration
- Document search budgets in benches/BUDGETS.md with conservative initial
  thresholds (small <3ms p95, medium <15ms p95, large <50ms p95)

Also sync beads issue tracker with latest search-track status updates
(br-3vwi.2.3 closed, br-3vwi.2.5 and br-3vwi.4.1 moved to in_progress,
br-3vwi.7.1 moved to in_progress).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
